de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts.meta

Class NoSpecifiedConverterException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts.meta.InjectionException
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts.meta.NoSpecifiedConverterException
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable

    public class NoSpecifiedConverterException
extends InjectionException
    Indicates a missing converter.

    This is exception is raised if StringConverter is found for string to the desired type T. The desired type is in the stored ProofScriptArgument.

    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      Creates an exception with the given arguments.

      • NoSpecifiedConverterException

        argument - the argument for which the conversion failed

        public NoSpecifiedConverterException(java.lang.String message,
